name: Sodas Sodyum Sanayii A.S.
summary: Sodas Sodyum Sanayii A.S. produces and sells chemicals in Turkey. The company offers natural sodium sulphate for use in detergent, glass, paper, fertilizer, chemical, and textile industries; and sodium chloride (salt). Sodas Sodyum Sanayii A.S. was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.
